{{Infobox artifact
| name = Heart (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

''See also: [[Heart (The Elder Empire: Shadow) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Heart is a pulsing, gray and green organ that serves as a powerful remnant of the [[Great Elder]] known as [[Nakothi]]. Roughly the size of a human fist, it functions by pumping a sludge-like liquid through veins and tendons to sustain the massive, undead remains of an [[Elder]]. While one version was worn by [[the Emperor]] to grant him immortality, it also exerted a corrupting influence, forcing him to use immense willpower to resist the madness caused by its presence. The Heart possesses a conscious mind and can project a seductive song to its carriers, promising rebirth and guidance. Because it contains the power of [[Nakothi]], destroying the Heart prematurely is extremely dangerous; doing so would release a sudden surge of energy capable of killing those nearby and transforming them into [[Children of the Dead Mother]], or potentially even awakening the [[Dead Mother]] herself. Consequently, such a remnant must be carefully weakened and contained before it can be safely eliminated.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Heart is an [[Elder]] artifact consisting of a piece of an [[Elder]]'s body and is closely associated with [[Nakothi]]. While various clients have hired people to seek the object, Clayborn specifically intends to retrieve it from [[Nakothi's island]] for the [[Am’haranai]], who wish to reclaim it. This powerful item has the ability to overpower [[Jorin]]'s seal and turn ancient bodies into [[Children of Nakothi]], posing a threat that could wake the [[Dead Mother]] if its power is released. Although the [[Sleepless]] are pleased by its arrival on the [[island]], [[Shera]] seeks to find the Heart to ensure it does not fall into their hands. Ultimately, the object disappeared on the [[island]] and is believed to have been destroyed.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Heart is an object that the [[Am’haranai]] wish to reclaim.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Clayborn intends to retrieve the Heart from [[Nakothi's island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]] believes her mother was trying to take the Heart for her own purposes.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|If the Heart's power is released, it could wake the [[Dead Mother]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Heart is an [[Elder]] artifact and a piece of an [[Elder]]'s body.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Heart overpowered the seal left by [[Jorin]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Heart turned ancient bodies into [[Children of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Sleepless]] are pleased that the Heart arrived on the [[Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]] believes she must keep the Heart out of the [[Sleepless]]' hands.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Shera]]'s goal is to find the Heart.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Heart is an object associated with [[Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Heart disappeared on the [[Island]] and is believed to have been destroyed.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Heart is something clients have hired people to seek.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“We have reason to believe that my mother was trying to take the Heart for her own purposes,” Meia said, voice controlled.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“Our Readers confirmed that the Heart disappeared on the Island. It did not leave, and so we conclude that it must have been destroyed.”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
